title: KGachaCraft
description: The data pack adds gacha mechanics to the game.
body:
![text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8e1cd4e7080d563af444f30a98953e62dc8d0bc.png)

# ⚔️ KGachaCraft
Turn your crafting table into a high-stakes forge! Ever felt that crafting in Minecraft was a bit too... predictable? KGachaCraft introduces a thrilling, RNG-based progression system that turns every crafting session into a gamble for greatness. No longer is a Diamond Sword just a Diamond Sword—it could be a legendary-tier relic or just another blade for the pile.

# 💎 How It Works
The moment you craft a weapon, the "Gacha" mechanic kicks in. The spirits of RNG determine the quality of your craft, instantly assigning a Rarity Tier to the item.

Each tier provides scaling bonuses to the item's core statistics, such as Attack Damage and Attack Speed. Will you settle for "Common," or will you keep crafting until you hit that 0.1% jackpot?



_Note: This project is currently in Active Development.
_
